description: This file defines the CorrectiveActionService class, which provides business logic for managing corrective actions in a defect management system. It includes methods for retrieving, listing, creating, updating, and deleting corrective actions, and interacts with repositories and domain classes such as CorrectiveAction, Defect, and User.

classes.name: CorrectiveActionService
classes.description: Service class responsible for managing corrective actions, including CRUD operations and listing with filters within the context of defect management.

methods.name: getOrThrow
methods.description: Retrieves a CorrectiveAction by ID or throws a ResponseStatusException if not found.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists CorrectiveActions filtered by defect ID, status, overdue status, or returns all if no filters are provided.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new CorrectiveAction associated with a defect and assigned user.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates an existing CorrectiveAction's fields and associations.

methods.name: resolveAssignee
methods.description: Resolves a User entity based on assignee ID, throws exception if not found.
